steps.title: Find the key claim
steps.content: Yazzie strove to convey exactly those characteristics of ikaah as a cultural practice—the ephemeral and dynamic nature—rather than just creating static objects.

steps.title: Match the answer to the claim
steps.content:
The correct answer shows how: the sandpaintings function as reminders of the ephemeral process of creation, where viewers tracked Yazzie's movements and shifts in sand throughout, rather than as self-contained objects.
  • A reinforces the tension
  • B attributes it to US art culture
  • D emphasizes Yazzie's broader cultural role rather than how the sandpaintings specifically convey practice characteristics


That is the correct answer.
